title: Infused Motion
description: It enhances the game with better animations, refined particles, and performance optimizations, creating a more immersive and responsive experience without altering core gameplay.
body:
Infused Motion is a lightweight client-side modpack focused on smooth gameplay, visual fluidity, and subtle graphical improvements while preserving Minecraft's original vanilla identity.

It enhances the game with better animations, refined particles, and performance optimizations, creating a more immersive and responsive experience without altering core gameplay.

All mods are client-side, making the pack fully compatible with vanilla servers.
